attributes.description: Alerts when slow queries exceed 10 in the window. Slow queries indicate query plan or indexing problems.
attributes.name: [MySQL OTel] High slow query rate

investigation_guide.blob:
## MySQL high slow query rate

### What fired
`INCREASE(mysql.query.slow.count) > 10` in the window.

### Why it matters
Slow queries exceed `long_query_time`. A spike suggests missing indexes, stale stats, or a change in traffic pattern.

### Triage
1. Enable slow query log and inspect the dominant queries.
2. Check EXPLAIN plans and index usage.

### Remediation
- Add missing indexes.
- Refactor queries.

### Tuning
- 10/window threshold; tune to `long_query_time`.

esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Slow query count is a monotonic counter; use INCREASE for delta over the time window
| WHERE metrics.mysql.query.slow.count IS NOT NULL
| STATS increase = SUM(INCREASE(metrics.mysql.query.slow.count))
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint
// Alert when more than 10 slow queries in the window; tune based on long_query_time and traffic
| WHERE increase > 10
| SORT increase DESC
